query: SELECT p.id, p.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM productColors WHERE productId = p.id) as color_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM productSizes WHERE productId = p.id) as size_count FROM products p;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 39BtYQyKHXzYXJi.7163615a4154 --database kDHKMkQxvxGGSdVdvmorSF --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM productColors WHERE productId = p.id) as color_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM productSizes WHERE productId = p.id) as size_count FROM products p;
